rationale: Build on the current best late projection EMA finalizer, but pivot away from more projection-EMA scheduling tweaks. This changes the quantization axis for `mlp.fc.weight` during both roundtrip training and final serialization, so the largest non-projection matrices get per-input-channel scales/offsets instead of per-output-row ones. That is a different error shape at essentially flat compressed size, while keeping the proven late projection EMA path intact.
title: Columnwise MLP Expansion Int8 With Projection EMA
